name: Make You Own Sweetened Condensed Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat water and sugar in a medium saucepan over low heat until the sugar dissolves, about 5 minutes.
2. Add butter to the mixture and continue heating until it melts.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Place instant milk into a food processor or blender.
5. Pour the water-sugar mixture into the blender or food processor.
6. Blend until well combined.
This makes 1 cup of sweetened condensed milk for fudge recipes. No leftovers like when using canned sweetened condensed milk.
Use in candy recipes as well as other applications.
